description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (build, test, finalization) using php:8.0-cli-alpine and php:8.1-cli-alpine images and include the Code-Quality template. In the build stage add build:php-8.0 and build:php-8.1 jobs that each run `curl -sSL https://getcomposer.org/download/2.3.5/composer.phar --output composer.phar`, `echo "3b3b5a899c06a46aec280727bdf50aad14334f6bc40436ea76b07b650870d8f4  composer.phar" > checksums`, `sha256sum -c checksums`, and `php composer.phar update --prefer-dist --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction --no-progress`, then cache the vendor/ directory with key $CI_JOB_NAME-composer-full and publish it as an artifact (vendor/, expire 1ŌĆ»hr). In the test stage add test:php-8.0 and test:php-8.1 jobs that depend on their respective build artifacts and run `php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpunit`; also add test:run-composer-require-checker that runs `curl -sSL https://github.com/maglnet/ComposerRequireChecker/releases/download/4.1.0/composer-require-checker.phar --output composer-require-checker.phar`, `echo "2a4c652de474e5dbbda1662ff82f207be7aa86b44912093cf5fb135345506e66  composer-require-checker.phar" > checksums`, `sha256sum -c checksums`, and `php ./composer-require-checker.phar check ./composer.json`; add test:run-phpcs that runs `php vendor/bin/phpcs src tests --warning-severity=8 --report-junit=./phpcs-test-report.xml` and publishes phpcs-test-report.xml as a JUnit artifact; and add test:run-phpstan that caches a cache directory, runs `php -d memory_limit=2048M vendor/bin/phpstan analyse -c phpstan-ci.neon --no-interaction --no-progress --error-format junit > ./phpstan-report.xml`, and always publishes phpstan-report.xml as a JUnit artifact. In the finalization stage add finalization:code-coverage that needs the build:php-8.1 artifacts and runs `phpdbg -d memory_limit=2048M -qrr vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never --coverage-html=coverage`, storing the coverage/ directory as an artifact (expire 1ŌĆ»week) and extracting line coverage via regex; also add finalization:package-php-8.0 and finalization:package-php-8.1 jobs that each run `curl -sSL https://getcomposer.org/download/2.3.5/composer.phar --output composer`, `echo "3b3b5a899c06a46aec280727bdf50aad14334f6bc40436ea76b07b650870d8f4  composer" > checksums`, `chmod +x composer`, `curl -sSL https://github.com/box-project/box/releases/download/3.16.0/box.phar --output box`, `echo "f508e28f309d7e95a319bdcd5f13dcfbb18eb91cb7a6cac9b69bc7799d78bdf9  box" >> checksums`, `sha256sum -c checksums`, `export PATH="$PATH:$(realpath .)"`, `./composer update --prefer-dist --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction --no-progress --no-dev`, and `php -d phar.readonly=0 ./box compile`, caching vendor/ with key $CI_JOB_NAME-composer-no-dev and publishing bin/distribution.phar as an artifact. Jobs run automatically according to stage order and defined needs without additional rules.
